def eligible_for_rental_assistance(self) -> bool:
        monthly_income = self.annual_income / 12
        # Eligibility is typically based on the rent-to-income ratio
        # A common standard is if rent exceeds 30% of gross monthly income
        is_rent_burdened = (self.monthly_rent / monthly_income) > 0.30
        # Low income threshold for basic eligibility
        is_low_income = self.annual_income < 30000
        
        return is_rent_burdened or is_low_income
